_comment: Stub validation rules for WHO ICD-10. Expand with real excludes, mandatory additional coding guidance, and laterality coverage where the source supports it.

excludes1_pairs.description: Subsequent myocardial infarction (I22) excludes acute myocardial infarction (I21) when the later event definition applies.
excludes1_pairs.note: Do not code I21.x and I22.x together for the same episode if I22 applies.

excludes1_pairs.description: Type 1 diabetes mellitus (E10) and type 2 diabetes mellitus (E11) should not both be assigned as the same primary diabetes type.
excludes1_pairs.note: The patient should not be assigned conflicting primary diabetes categories without clear justification.

mandatory_additional_codes.description: For acute myocardial infarction, consider whether separately documented tobacco use or dependence should also be captured.
For type 2 diabetes mellitus with kidney complications, review whether associated renal disease detail is documented elsewhere in the note.
